description.value: A Small creature can fit in the backseat of an urban cruiser that already has 3 passengers.

Trigger A creature with a comm unit enters the haunt's area

Effect The haunt utters threats through the triggering comm unit, dealing @Damage[(1d6+4)[mental]] damage to creatures within 20 feet of the comm unit (@Check[will|dc:19|basic] save). On a failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

details.description: Angry spirits utter haunting threats and condemnations through a nearby comm unit.
details.disable: @Check[religion|dc:15] (trained) to banish the spirits, or @Check[performance|dc:18] to drown out the spirits' voices, or @Check[computers|dc:16] (trained) to disperse the ghostly signal

description.value:
Trigger A living creature moves within 15 feet of the monument

Effect The souls of all those killed by this monument surge outward, dealing @Damage[(4d10+22)[void]] damage to all living creatures within 60 feet of the monument (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] save). Creatures killed by this haunt have their soul trapped in the monument until the monument is destroyed.

details.description: This shrine has long served as an altar for sacrificial rites and foul magic. When non-believers approach the monument, the souls of all those killed here surge out to reap their lives.
details.disable: @Check[deception|dc:33] (master) to pose as a believer and command the monument to still, or @Check[religion|dc:30] (expert) to pray to the gods for protection, or @Check[occultism|dc:30] (expert) to soothe the trapped spirits; two successes are required to disable it

description.value: The only way to use the wind propulsion of a turboglider is to jump off a steep incline or if you're already in the air. An uncontrolled turboglider using wind propulsion falls 60 feet each round until the pilot successfully Takes Control. A turboglider must be controlled to switch propulsion. If the glider hits the ground before the pilot successfully Takes Control, the pilot and the glider each take falling damage.

Trigger A creature touches the fence directly or with a tool

Effect The trap deals @Damage[1d10[electricity]] damage to the triggering creature. The trap rolls initiative if it hasn't already.

details.description: A 15-foot-tall electrified fence electrocutes anyone who touches it.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to ground a 10-foot portion of the fence, or @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to cut power to the fence
details.routine: (1 action) The trap electrocutes each creature touching the fence directly or with a tool, dealing @Damage[1d10[electricity]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] save).

description.value:
Trigger A creature begins its turn in the fog

Effect The fog surges with energy, dealing @Damage[(6d10+27)[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the fog as it harmfully mutates their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage. It resists mutation.

Failure The creature takes full damage. Its flesh becomes coated in foul-smelling blisters for 1 hour. For as long as it has this mutation, it is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} and can't reduce the value of its sickened condition.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage. Its limbs become painfully twisted for [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}. For as long as it has this mutation, it is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and can't reduce the value of its sickened condition.

details.description: A fog of transmutative fumes fills a 30-foot radius area, painfully mutating creatures who enter.
details.disable: @Check[nature|dc:35] (master) to neutralize the fog, or @Check[survival|dc:35] (master) to disperse the fog

description.value:
Trigger A non-mindless creature comes within 5 feet of the memory crystals

Effect The memory crystals expand into every square adjacent to their space. As they grow, they absorb memories and ambient thought from their surroundings, dealing @Damage[8d10[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:42|basic] save) to creatures within 10 feet after they expand.

Aura 5ft

Memory crystals deal @Damage[8d10[mental]] damage to nearby creatures.

details.description: Glowing yellow crystals refract the blurred imprints of stolen memories within their facets.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:48] (legendary) to erect mental wards, or @Check[occultism|dc:48] (legendary) to harmlessly feed surface thoughts to the crystals, or @Check[religion|dc:51] (legendary) to pray for protection from the crystals
details.reset: After expanding, the memory crystals can't grow again for 1 day.

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves within 5 feet of a sensor

Effect The lasers fire, each one Striking a creature in the hallway. If there are more creatures than lasers, the lasers prioritize the triggering creature or creatures; if there are fewer creatures than lasers, the lasers prioritize Striking the triggering creature or creatures multiple times.
No multiple attack penalty

details.description: Six sensors concealed in a 15-foot-long corridor fire lasers when they detect movement.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:15] (trained) or Thievery (trained) to disable each sensor, or @Check[acrobatics|dc:23] (expert) to slip past each sensor

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves within reach of the robotic arm

Effect The trap makes an arm Strike against the triggering creature, then Grabs (+17 Athletics). A creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the trap takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] damage until they @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} (DC 27) or the trap is deactivated or destroyed.

details.description: A robotic manufacturing arm malfunctions, attacking nearby creatures.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:20] (trained) to debug the malfunctioning arm, or @Check[crafting|dc:25] (trained) to cause the arm's joints to seize, or @Check[thievery|dc:23] (trained) to disable the arm

description.value:
Trigger A creature touches the console directly or with a tool

Effect The haunt distracts the user with colorful graphics and interesting data while lowering their mental defenses. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save. The trap then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is stupefied 1.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}. Additionally, they are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with the computer and can't take any actions except to passively view the data on the computer. At the end of each of their turns, they can retry this saving throw to remove the fascinated condition.

details.description: A ghostly hacker haunts their computer and attempts to drain the spirit of anyone who accessed the computer.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:16] (trained) to partition the haunted code, or @Check[religion|dc:18] (trained) or Occultism (trained) to exorcise the spirit
details.routine: (1 action) The haunt absorbs the spirits of the living, dealing @Damage[(1d10+4)[spirit]] damage to all living creatures within 10 feet of the computer (@Check[will|dc:18|basic] save). On a critical failure, a creature is additionally @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. This routine doesn't count as a hostile action for the purposes of ending the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} condition.

description.value:
Trigger Two or more creatures end their turn in the room

Effect The doors slam shut, sealing the room. The trap then rolls initiative.

details.description: When activated, the automated trash compactor slowly crushes everything inside it.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:26] (expert) to jam the crushing mechanism, or @Check[thievery|dc:24] (expert) to deactivate the trap; @Check[athletics|dc:28] (trained) to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} the door (this doesn't disable the trap)
details.reset: The trap deactivates and resets after 1 minute.
details.routine: (1 action) Two of the room's walls move 5 feet toward the center of the room, automatically pushing any creatures in those spaces 5 feet closer to the room's center and dealing @Damage[(2d8+9)[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the room (@Check[fortitude|dc:24|basic] save). Creatures that die from this damage are crushed to a fine paste.

description.value:
Requirements The skyboat is in a rainstorm

Effect The skyboat harnesses the storm's electrical energy through its magical sails, then expels this energy as a bolt of lightning that erupts from the front of the skyboat. The lightning deals @Damage[2d8[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a @Template[type:line|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save). Harness the Storm stops working if the skyboat is broken.

Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the turret

Effect The trap makes a laser Strike against the creature; the trap rolls initiative.

details.description: A concealed turret pops up and fires a laser when intruders enter a secure area.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:18] (trained) to reprogram the turret, or @Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to cut power to the turret, or @Check[thievery|dc:16] (trained) to disable the turret
details.routine: (3 actions) The trap makes a laser Strike against up to three creatures in range, or multiple Strikes against one creature in range if it has no additional targets.

description.value: The pilot engages transference mode, causing the wakeskimmer to launch itself from a body of water (or other fluid) up into orbit or to plummet from space into the sea, at a Speed of 1,500 feet per round.

This vehicle protects its users from the dangers of space, including the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.FLODmOj4yK7eJn0a]{Basic Environmental Protection} and a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0kD0MZgiK0SYS6e6]{Commercial Filtered Rebreather}.

details.speed: fly 60 feet (motorized; space only) or swim 40 feet (motorized)

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the device

Effect The trap makes a loud noise. At the end of the next round, the device explodes, dealing @Damage[(2d6+5)[piercing]] damage to all creatures within 15 feet of the device (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save). This explosion destroys the device.

details.description: A generator, engine, or other large immobile device overloads and is moments from catastrophically exploding.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:19] (trained) to safely shut down the device, or @Check[thievery|dc:21] (trained) to quickly vent the device

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves below the nozzles

Effect The trap sprays cold air on the triggering creature, dealing @Damage[(4d10+26)[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:33] save).

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage, becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} or [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, becomes clumsy 2, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 minute. Creatures within 10 feet of the triggering creature take @Damage[(2d12+13)[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:29|basic] save).

details.description: Hidden nozzles in the ceiling release hyper-cold air, potentially freezing intruders in place.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:27] (master) to increase the air's temperature to safe levels, or @Check[thievery|dc:27] (master) to deactivate the nozzles

description.value: A hoverboard maintains an altitude of 6 inches above other surfaces, such as the ground or water. If driven off a high surface, the hoverboard loses 20 feet of altitude per round, landing without harm to the hoverboard or its pilot.
The hoverboard can be carried as an item with 1 Bulk.

Trigger A creature comes within 15 feet of the flower

Effect The flower makes a nectar Strike against the triggering creature.

details.description: An alien flower sprays a stream of caustic nectar.
details.disable: @Check[nature|dc:13] (trained) to lull the flower into a passive state, or @Check[survival|dc:13] (trained) to mislead the flower's senses; @Check[acrobatics|dc:16] to move by the flower without triggering it (this doesn't disable the trap)
details.reset: The flower's nectar reserve is refilled after 1 hour.

description.value:
Trigger A creature attempts to pass the designated area

Effect The force field appears and shunts the creature away, making a Strike against the triggering creature.

plus the target is knocked back 10 feet (20 feet on a critical hit). The force field takes a –2 circumstance penalty to hit if the triggering creature Stepped or was moved by a forced movement effect.

details.description: A translucent force field appears to block a creature's path, shunting it and any other creature that attempts to pass it away.
details.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:33] (expert) to disable the force field, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (6th rank; counteract DC 29) to counteract the force field
details.reset: The force field deactivates and the trap resets after 1 minute.

description.value:
Trigger A creatures touches or damages the fungus

Effect The fungus releases psychotropic spores in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. All creatures in the area must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:21] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 10 minutes (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure).

details.description: A colorful fungus releases psychotropic spores when a creature comes near.
details.disable: @Check[nature|dc:20] (trained) to force the fungus into a dormant state, or @Check[survival|dc:22] (trained) to safely remove the fungus
details.reset: Dormant fungus reactivates in 1 hour; destroyed fungus regrows over the course of 2 weeks.

description.value:
Trigger A creature steps on a pressure plate

Effect The trap makes a tranquilizer dart Strike against up to three creatures in the hall. Ranged tranquilizer dart +14, Damage 1d6 piercing and 1d6 poison plus tranquilizer; no multiple attack penalty Tranquilizer (incapacitation, poison)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 clumsy 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and asleep for 1 minute (1 minute)

details.description: Weight-sensitive pressure plates in the floor trigger a hole at the hallway's end to fire tranquilizer darts at creatures in the hall.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:18] (trained) or Thievery (trained) to disable the pressure plates

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves within 10 feet of the rift

Effect The triggering creature takes 6d10+20 damage as its body rapidly ages. It must attempt a @Check[will|dc:33] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, becomes clumsy 2 and enfeebled 2, and becomes slowed for 1 minute.

details.description: A rift in time rapidly ages and slows anyone who draws near.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:36] (master) or Occultism (master) to magically mend time, @Check[thievery|dc:40] (master) to repair the time rift, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (7th rank; counteract DC 31) to counteract the rift

description.value:
Trigger A creature begins to play the vidgame

Effect The trap attempts to pull all players into the vidgame. Each player must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save. The trap then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and can play the game from the safety of reality.

Success The creature is pulled into the game for 1 round, then immediately escapes the game, returning to reality.

Failure The creature is pulled into the game and can't escape the game until the trap is disabled.

Critical Failure The creature is pulled into the game and can't escape the game until the trap is disabled. Unfortunately, it's playing on hard mode, and it treats the DC of the trap's routine as 2 higher.

If the vidgame console is turned off, all creatures inside the vidgame remain inside the vidgame and are temporarily removed from reality. If the vidgame console is turned back on, these creatures continue the game where they left off.

details.description: A hyperrealistic vidgame pulls players into a virtual world, transforming them into pixelated avatars and pitting them against deadly challenges.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:22] (trained) to reprogram the game, or @Check[thievery|dc:22] (trained) to exploit a glitch, or @Check[vidgame-lore|dc:17] (trained) to beat the game; four total successes are required to disable the trap
details.routine: (1 action) The trap presents the game's players with deadly challenges as 1 action. Each creature inside the game takes @Damage[(2d8+5)[slashing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save). A creature can attempt a Vidgame Lore check in place of their saving throw, if desired.

description.value:
Trigger A creature grasps the console directly or with a tool

Effect The trap deals @Damage[5d8[electricity]] damage to the triggering creature and creatures within 5 feet of the triggering creature (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save).

details.description: A shock grid built into a computer console or door panel releases a powerful electric charge.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:16] (trained) to disable the console's programming, or @Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to rewire the shock grid, or @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to deactivate the shock grid

description.value:
Trigger One or more creatures enters the airlock compartment

Effect The outer airlock door opens, venting breathable air out into the vacuum or harmful atmosphere beyond. The creature begins suffocating and must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:20] save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is sucked 10 feet out of the airlock and takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

Critical Failure The target is sucked 10 feet out of the airlock and takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

details.description: A malfunctioning airlock opens unexpectedly while creatures are inside.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to repair the airlock, or @Check[thievery|dc:17] (trained) to jam the airlock closed

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the dormant tear

Effect A tear opens in reality, gouging a 5-foot radius hole in the earth. The trap rolls initiative.

details.description: A tear in reality emits a chaotic churn of energy into the air like a geyser, raining destruction down on an area.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:27] (expert) to diffuse the magical energy, or @Check[nature|dc:25] (expert) to seal the tear, or @Check[survival|dc:30] (trained) to coax the earth back together
details.routine: (2 actions) A chaotic churn of energy blasts out of the tear, dealing @Damage[(2d10+5)[acid]] damage to all creatures in a 30-foot-tall cylinder centered on the tear (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). Creatures damaged by this energy are additionally pushed 10 feet into the air (20 feet on a critical failure). This dispersed energy then rains down, dealing @Damage[1d10[fire]] damage to all creatures within 60 feet of the tear (@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] save).

description.value:
Trigger An intelligent creature enters the area

Effect The trap deals @Damage[(4d8+18)[mental]] damage to all intelligent creatures who can perceive the visions (@Check[will|dc:26|basic] save). Creatures who critically fail additionally lose themself in the visions, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

details.description: Wisps of reality-warping magic that flit through the room are drawn to intelligent creatures, filling their minds with visions of countless alternate realities.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:26] (expert) to banish the visions, or @Check[occultism|dc:28] (expert) to exert your will over the visions, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (4th rank; counteract DC 24) to counteract the visions

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the turret or attacks the turret

Effect The turret makes a ranged Strike against the triggering creature; the trap then rolls initiative.

Oversized machine gun (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|traits:analog] save) (analog, @Template[type:cone|distance:45]), Damage @Damage[(2d8+7)[piercing]|options:area-damage]

You attempt to hit each creature in a cone with a range equal to half the weapon's range increment without making an attack roll. Any creature in the area takes weapon damage (Basic DC 25 reflex save). This damage is area damage. Creatures that critically fail this save are subject to effects that occur on a critical hit with this weapon, including the weapon's critical specialization effect. Auto-Fire has an expend equal to the number of targets in the area × 2.

details.description: A mechanized turret attacks intruders.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:20] (trained) to reprogram the turret, or @Check[crafting|dc:19] (trained) to cut power to the turret, or @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to disable the turret
details.routine: (3 actions) The trap makes three oversized machine gun Strikes against a creature in range, or the trap makes an Auto-Fire attack followed by one Strike against a creature in range.

description.value:
Trigger A creature touches the egg sac or touches a filament

Effect The trap makes a filament Strike against all creatures within 30 feet of the egg sac, then the egg sac explodes, dealing @Damage[(2d10+9)[acid]] damage to all creatures within 30 feet (@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save). If the creature within the egg sac is viable, it hatches.
No multiple attack penalty

details.description: An ovular alien egg sac emerges from the ground or other surface; pulsing, veinlike filaments cover all surfaces in a 30-foot radius around the egg sac.
details.disable: @Check[nature|dc:30] (trained) to cause the egg sac to implode, or @Check[survival|dc:23] (expert) to safely destroy the filaments in an adjacent square
details.reset: If the egg sac survives and hasn't hatched, filaments regrow in 1 day.

description.value:
Trigger A creature moves within 10 feet of the haunted area

Effect The haunt replays the traumatic moment that created it, vividly assaulting the creature's senses as though the creature was experiencing the event. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:24] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes @Damage[(2d8+5)[mental]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes @Damage[(4d8+10)[mental]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target takes @Damage[(8d8+20)[mental]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

details.description: A psychic imprint of a horrific event replays in vivid detail.
details.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:28] (expert) or Religion (expert) to cleanse the area

description.value:
Trigger A creature enters the room or ends its turn in the room

Effect The trap makes a nanite Strike against the triggering creature, then rolls initiative.
No multiple attack penalty

Trigger A creature within the room ends its turn

Effect The trap makes a nanite Strike against the triggering creature.

stealth.details: (expert) or DC 31 (expert) to notice the control panel

details.description: When sensors detect movement in the trapped room, the doors seal shut, and four wall apertures open, releasing disintegrating nanites into the room.
details.disable: @Check[crafting|dc:22] (trained) or Thievery (trained) on the control panel to deactivate the trap, or @Check[computers|dc:24] (trained) to reprogram the control panel
details.reset: The trap deactivates and resets after 1 minute.
details.routine: (1 action) The trap launches nanites against every creature in the room as 1 action. Because it launches nanites continuously, the trap can also use the Nanite Swarm free action (see below) to launch nanites at each creature during that creature's turn.

description.value:
Trigger A creature views the reactor's sensors or console

Effect Creatures within 60 feet of the reactor are exposed to incredible radiation (@Check[fortitude|dc:32]; page 91). The trap rolls initiative.

Trigger The trap completed its routine with a radius of 100 feet

Effect The reactor explodes, dealing @Damage[(4d10+20)[fire]] damage in a 500 foot radius, bypassing the hardness of any items in the blast zone (@Check[fortitude|dc:46|basic] save). Everything in the area is exposed to incredible radiation. The area of the nuclear explosion becomes irradiated, leaking severe radiation for 50 years.

details.description: A nuclear reactor overloads, then explodes.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:45] (master) or Crafting (master) to initiate shutdown procedures, or @Check[thievery|dc:47] (master) to vent the reactor; three total successes are required to disable the trap
details.routine: (1 action) As the reactor overheats, the trap deals @Damage[(4d10+20)[fire]] damage to creatures within 60 feet (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic] save). All creatures in the area are exposed to incredible radiation. Each time the trap uses this routine, the area increases by 10 feet. When the routine's radius equals 100 feet, resolve the routine. Then, the reactor immediately explodes, using Nuclear Explosion.

description.value: The torpedo minisub can travel beneath the surface of the water, carrying an air reservoir suitable to sustain 2 Medium creatures for up to 24 hours. The torpedo minisub can safely reach depths of up to 1 mile. If broken, the torpedo minisub loses air from its reservoir, reducing the stored air by 10 minutes per round. A broken torpedo minisub has its maximum depth reduced by half (and rises to that depth when broken, if necessary).

Trigger An effect damages the building, or the ground around the building shifts

Effect The building shudders and creaks, signaling an imminent collapse. The building's interior becomes difficult terrain. The trap rolls initiative.

details.description: A building collapses, harming everyone inside.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:38] (expert) or Nature (expert) to magically prop up the building, @Check[crafting|dc:34] (master) or Survival (master) to stabilize the building, @Check[religion|dc:38] (expert) to pray for the collapse to cease; four total successes are required to stop the collapse
details.routine: (1 action) The building begins to collapse. All creatures in the building take @Damage[(3d10+18)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:39|basic] save). A creature that critically fails its save is additionally knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] damage.

description.value: A forklift carries its cargo on its front forks and can carry up to 1,000 Bulk.
The pilot raises the forklift's forks up to 15 feet in the air, or lowers the forklift's forks down to the ground.

Trigger An unauthorized creature grasps the computer directly or with a tool

Effect The trap attempts to upload the triggering creature's soul into the computer. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:40] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[(3d10+15)[spirit]] damage.

Failure The creature's soul is temporarily pulled from their body. It takes @Damage[(6d10+30)[spirit]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.

Critical Failure The creature's soul is pulled from its body and uploaded to a data module on the computer. Its body remains a soulless vessel, which slowly dies over the course of 1 week unless its soul is returned. Destroying the computer destroys its soul.

details.description: A computer is protected by a hybrid trap, which uploads the soul of all unauthorized users to an inert data module on the computer.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:36] (expert) to drain the computer's magical energy, or @Check[computers|dc:36] (expert) to falsify authorized credentials, or @Check[thievery|dc:40] (expert) to disable the trap, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (7th rank; counteract DC 34) to counteract the trap

description.value:
Trigger A creature touches the quantum particles

Effect The quantum particles materialize a perfect copy of the triggering creature. The quantum clone is visually identical to the creature and mimics the creature's actions and speech until it has time to observe and learn the creature's patterns well enough to act entirely on its own, a process that takes 1 minute. The quantum clone materializes with no weapons or equipment but can use unarmed Strikes if the creature has them. The quantum clone rolls initiative.

1 to 3 The quantum clone mimics an action it's observed the triggering creature take, including class abilities, movements, spells, and speech. It attacks on its initiative, using the same statistics as the original creature.

details.description: Quantum particles form an exact copy of a creature that can mimic its actions, speech, and thoughts with eerie perfection.
details.disable: @Check[intimidation|dc:42] (master) to frighten the clone away, or @Check[diplomacy|dc:42] (master) to reach an accord with the clone, or @Check[arcana|dc:45] (master) or Nature (master) to disperse the quantum particles; three total successes are required to disable the trap
details.routine: (3 actions) The quantum clone observes the triggering creature and mimics the creature's behavior, taking hostile actions as soon as it takes damage. For the first 2 rounds, the quantum clone takes actions in the exact order the triggering creature did, but in the following rounds, it acts tactically, using actions and reactions it observed the creature using in any order.

description.value:
A creature moves within 30 feet of the hovercar

Effect The hovercar drives 30 feet in a straight line, dealing @Damage[(2d10+13)[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the area it passes through (@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic] save). Creatures damaged by the car are additionally knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The trap then rolls initiative.

details.description: A hovercar's autopilot goes haywire, causing it to run over nearby creatures.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:26] (expert) to remotely reprogram the autopilot, or @Check[piloting|dc:24] or @Check[thievery|dc:24] (expert) to override the autopilot while aboard the car; three total successes are required to disable the trap; @Check[acrobatics|dc:23] or @Check[athletics|dc:23] to board the car (boarding doesn't disable the trap)
details.routine: (3 actions) The trap loses 1 action each turn for each successful disable. The hovercar uses 1 action to drive 30 feet in a straight line, three times, changing direction between actions as desired. Creatures in the area the hovercar passes through take @Damage[(2d10+13)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic] save). Creatures damaged by the car are additionally knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

description.value: The enercycle can be pulled along the ground on its wheel by a Medium creature. The creature is encumbered.

This vehicle is programmed to deploy from another airborne vehicle or spaceship and fall toward the ground at a rate of 500 feet the first round and 1,500 feet each round thereafter, for a world with normal gravity. One round before impact, antigrav rotors, parachutes, and retrorockets slow the descent to 60 feet per round, allowing for a safe landing (even if uncontrolled).
The pilot and passengers of a drop pod are completely enclosed and don't have line of sight or line of effect with any creatures or objects outside the vehicle.

This vehicle protects its users from the dangers of space, including the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.FLODmOj4yK7eJn0a]{Basic Environmental Protection} and a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0kD0MZgiK0SYS6e6]{Commercial Filtered Rebreather}.

Trigger A creature enters the sensor's detection area

Effect The trap releases a gravity pulse, dealing @Damage[(2d6+3)[force]] damage to the triggering creature (@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] save). The area within 30 feet of the sensor then becomes zero gravity for 1 minute.

details.description: A harmful pulse of anti-gravity is activated by a sensor that detects motion within 30 feet.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:18] (trained) to jam the motion detector's signal or @Check[thievery|dc:16] (trained) to deactivate the motion detector

description.value:
Trigger A creature in the area finishes an action

Effect The trap launches a targeted ad enticing viewers to spend credits on a product or service. All creatures within 30 feet who can see, hear, or sense the ad must attempt a @Check[will|dc:17] save. The trap rolls initiative.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}.

Failure The target is dazzled and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} for 1 round and can't take any actions except to access the nearest computer or comm unit and make purchases as directed by the ad.

stealth.details: (trained), or DC 20 (expert) to notice the holoprojector, or detect magic

details.description: Colorful, lifelike figures flit in and out of a holographic advertisement in a barrage of pleasant sounds and sensations, enticing passersby to spend their credits. The hologram's source is a nearby projector.
details.disable: @Check[computers|dc:17] (trained) to deactivate the ad, or @Check[crafting|dc:20] (trained) or Thievery (trained) to disable the projector
details.reset: The trap deactivates and resets after 1 minute.
details.routine: (1 action) The hazard plays a new ad each round, forcing all creatures that can sense it to attempt a new save.

description.value: The patrol dirigible can only be steered using its motorized propulsion, otherwise relying on favorable wind currents to carry it in the right direction. If the pilot fails to maintain control of the dirigible using its wind propulsion, the dirigible drifts whichever way the wind carries it, moving up to four times its Speed each round as determined by the GM.
The patrol dirigible provides a place for up to two Huge or smaller vehicles to be docked.

Trigger A creature crosses the street

Effect A phantom hover truck crashes into all creatures crossing the street, dealing @Damage[(6d12+37)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:43] save).

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage, is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, and is pushed 10 feet back.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is knocked prone, and is pushed 20 feet back.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is knocked prone, and is pushed 30 feet back.

stealth.details: (master) to hear the roar of hover jets

details.description: A phantom hover truck collides with creatures, replaying an accident from the past in gory detail.
details.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:38] (master) to disperse the phantom truck, or @Check[religion|dc:36] (master) to ward yourself from harm
